name: ibrahimcenter
description: The canonical memory of Ibrahim Islamic Center, Houston (618 Baca Street, Third Ward roots, founded by converts 20+ years ago). Everything true about the institution lives here as plain text; the public website is a projection built from it. The only editing interface is the AI consultant — see [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) for the constitution (one-interface law, approval law, privacy boundary, entity conventions).
